list.name: tenant
list.label: Tenant
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, tenant_name AS __text FROM dc3_manager.dc3_tenant WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id

list.name: driver
list.label: Driver
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, driver_name AS __text FROM dc3_manager.dc3_driver WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = ${tenant:raw} ORDER BY driver_name

list.name: device
list.label: Device
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, device_name AS __text FROM dc3_manager.dc3_device WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = ${tenant:raw} AND (${driver:raw} = '$__all' OR driver_id IN ($driver)) ORDER BY device_name

list.name: point
list.label: Point
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT pv.point_id AS __value, COALESCE(p.point_name, 'point ' || pv.point_id) AS __text FROM dc3_point_value pv LEFT JOIN dc3_manager.dc3_point p ON p.id = pv.point_id AND p.tenant_id = pv.tenant_id WHERE pv.tenant_id = ${tenant:raw} AND (${device:raw} = '$__all' OR pv.device_id IN ($device)) ORDER BY __text

targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(sample_count) AS value FROM cagg_point_value_1h WHERE bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() AND tenant_id = ${tenant:raw} AND (${driver:raw} = '$__all' OR driver_id IN ($driver)) AND (${device:raw} = '$__all' OR device_id IN ($device)) AND (${point:raw} = '$__all' OR point_id IN ($point))

SELECT count(DISTINCT point_id) AS value FROM cagg_point_value_1h WHERE bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() AND tenant_id = ${tenant:raw} AND (${driver:raw} = '$__all' OR driver_id IN ($driver)) AND (${device:raw} = '$__all' OR device_id IN ($device))

SELECT count(DISTINCT device_id) AS value FROM cagg_point_value_1h WHERE bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() AND tenant_id = ${tenant:raw} AND (${driver:raw} = '$__all' OR driver_id IN ($driver))

SELECT count(*) AS value FROM dc3_manager.dc3_point p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.tenant_id = ${tenant:raw} AND p.enable_flag = 0 AND (${point:raw} = '$__all' OR p.id IN ($point)) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM cagg_point_value_1h pv WHERE pv.point_id = p.id AND pv.tenant_id = p.tenant_id AND pv.bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND pv.bucket < $__timeTo())

SELECT bucket AS "time", sum(sample_count) AS "samples/min" FROM cagg_point_value_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND tenant_id = ${tenant:raw} AND (${driver:raw} = '$__all' OR driver_id IN ($driver)) AND (${device:raw} = '$__all' OR device_id IN ($device)) AND (${point:raw} = '$__all' OR point_id IN ($point)) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

panels.title: Selected Point Value
panels.description: Average numeric value of the selected point per minute, with min/max band. Uses time_bucket_gapfill so dropped sample windows show as gaps instead of flat lines. String-typed points (num_value NULL) are excluded.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('$__interval', bucket, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) AS "time", num_avg AS "avg", num_min AS "min", num_max AS "max" FROM cagg_point_value_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND tenant_id = ${tenant:raw} AND (${device:raw} = '$__all' OR device_id IN ($device)) AND (${point:raw} = '$__all' OR point_id IN ($point)) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Points — latest value, last seen, sample count
panels.description: One row per point in the current filter. latest_bucket = most recent minute bucket with data; samples = total samples in the selected time range; silent = no sample in range. LEFT JOINs keep value rows even if metadata was soft-deleted.

targets.rawSql:
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT tenant_id, driver_id, device_id, point_id,
         max(bucket)              AS latest_bucket,
         sum(sample_count)        AS range_samples,
         (array_agg(cal_last ORDER BY bucket DESC))[1] AS latest_cal
  FROM cagg_point_value_1m
  WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
    AND tenant_id = ${tenant:raw}
    AND (${driver:raw} = '$__all' OR driver_id IN ($driver))
    AND (${device:raw} = '$__all' OR device_id IN ($device))
    AND (${point:raw} = '$__all'  OR point_id IN ($point))
  GROUP BY tenant_id, driver_id, device_id, point_id
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(d.device_name,  'device '  || agg.device_id)  AS "Device",
  COALESCE(p.point_name,   'point '   || agg.point_id)   AS "Point",
  COALESCE(p.unit, '')                                   AS "Unit",
  agg.latest_cal                                        AS "Latest Value",
  date_trunc('second', agg.latest_bucket)               AS "Last Seen",
  agg.range_samples                                     AS "Samples",
  CASE WHEN agg.range_samples = 0 THEN 'silent' ELSE 'active' END AS "Status",
  COALESCE(drv.driver_name, '')                         AS "Driver"
FROM agg
LEFT JOIN dc3_manager.dc3_point  p   ON p.id   = agg.point_id  AND p.tenant_id   = agg.tenant_id AND p.deleted   = 0
LEFT JOIN dc3_manager.dc3_device d   ON d.id   = agg.device_id AND d.tenant_id   = agg.tenant_id AND d.deleted   = 0
LEFT JOIN dc3_manager.dc3_driver drv ON drv.id = agg.driver_id AND drv.tenant_id = agg.tenant_id AND drv.deleted = 0
ORDER BY agg.latest_bucket DESC NULLS LAST
